title: media.rs: compute_blurhash re-decodes image that is already decoded
description: process_image_bytes() decodes the input, optionally resizes, then re-encodes to Vec<u8>. compute_blurhash() is called with those encoded bytes and immediately calls image::load_from_memory() again, paying a full JPEG/PNG decode cycle for every upload. Fix: return the DynamicImage from process_image_bytes and pass it to compute_blurhash directly, skipping the re-encode/re-decode round trip.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
